name: Raffle
shortDescription: On-chain raffles for your community. Create raffles, add prizes, sell tickets, reveal winners.
longDescription: The Raffle module lets admins create and run on-chain raffles. Set ticket price and max entrants, add prizes, start selling, and reveal winners. Members buy tickets with the configured token. Optional whitelist for eligibility per raffle.
keyInfo: Create raffles with configurable ticket price and max entrants
Add prizes (multiple tokens). Start, pause, reveal winner
Base tier: 5 USDC per raffle; Grow/Pro: 0 USDC
Optional whitelist per raffle for eligibility

activationInstructions.intro: Run raffles for your community. Create raffles, add prizes, sell tickets, reveal winners.
steps: Create a raffle (5 USDC on Base tier; 0 on Grow/Pro)
Add prizes, start, and sell tickets
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per raffle when you create one on Base tier.
